ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_superuser" INTEGER /* Whether the user has superuser privileges */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "is_staff" INTEGER /* Whether the user is a staff member */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user is active */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date and time the user joined */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* User's timezone */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date and time of the last password change */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "locked_until" TEXT /* Date and time until which the account is locked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team was last updated */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "is_leader" INTEGER /* Whether the user is the leader of the team */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user joined the team */,
  "left_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user left the team */,
  "role_in_team" TEXT /* Role of the user within the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_history" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged in */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Date and time of login */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Date and time of logout */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for login */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the activity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_reset" (
  "reset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who requested a password reset */,
  "reset_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the password reset request */,
  "reset_token" TEXT /* Token for the password reset */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the password reset request was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the password reset request */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the password reset request */,
  "expired_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the reset token expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_reset_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the profile */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File path to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio */,
  "social_links" TEXT /* JSON string or comma-separated list of social media links */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_invitations" (
  "invitation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team invitation */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user was invited to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was invited */,
  "invitation_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the invitation */,
  "invited_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the invitation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invitation */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message sent with the invitation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invitation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_invitations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_invitations_invited_by FOREIGN KEY ("invited_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_invitations_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was read */,
  "message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the notification */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source entity that triggered the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
